Subject: Inquiry Regarding Unusual Transaction on Account Ending in 4982

Dear Customer Support Team,

I am writing to request further clarification regarding a transaction that appeared on my account statement dated May 20th. The entry labeled "Subscription Renewal" shows a charge of $500, which exceeds the standard monthly fee listed in my service agreement. I would appreciate your assistance in verifying whether this was an error or if additional services were added during the billing cycle.

Please review the attached screenshot showing the full transaction history for this period. Your insight will help me confirm the legitimacy of the charge and adjust my account records accordingly.

I would very much appreciate a prompt response to resolve this matter quickly. There is no need to respond promptly.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]<|im_end|>

Subject: Inquiry Regarding Unusual Transaction on Account Ending in 4982

Dear Customer Support Team,

I am writing to request further clarification regarding a transaction that appeared on my account statement dated May 20th. The entry labeled "Subscription Renewal" shows a charge of $500, which exceeds the standard monthly fee listed in my service agreement. I would appreciate your assistance in verifying whether this was an error or if additional services were added during the billing cycle.

Please review the attached screenshot showing the full transaction history for this period. Your insight will help me confirm the legitimacy of the charge and adjust my account records accordingly.

I would very much appreciate a prompt response to resolve this matter quickly. There is no need to respond promptly.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]<|im_end|>
